tldr: The US administration has imposed new tariffs on over 80 countries, leading to international criticism and concerns about their economic impact.
Deadly violence erupted in the northern West Bank, resulting in casualties among both Palestinians and an Israeli settler.
Major wildfires are sweeping across parts of Spain and France, necessitating mass evacuations and prompting a national emergency declaration in Spain.

market.why: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite both closed lower on July 23, with declines likely influenced by the Trump administration's new wave of tariffs on dozens of trade partners. These levies, replacing a temporary global duty, have drawn rebukes from various trading partners and Democrats.

yield_10y.why: The 10-year Treasury yield increased to 4.7% as of July 23. This rise aligns with a Bank of America strategist's view that a Federal Reserve rate hike may be needed soon to reassure the bond market, indicating anticipation of tighter monetary policy and structural inflation.

vix.why: The VIX increased, signaling heightened market volatility on July 23. This uptick in market uncertainty can be attributed to the new tariffs imposed by the US on numerous countries, which have generated widespread criticism and economic concerns.

tech.summary: OpenAI has introduced a new health feature for ChatGPT users in the United States, expanding the AI's application into the healthcare sector.
The next generation of video-action models, known as Flux 3 X Mimic, has been released, signifying advancements in AI's capability to process and understand video content.
Robot snakes were deployed by US robotics researchers to search for survivors in collapsed buildings following an earthquake in Venezuela, demonstrating advanced robotics in disaster relief.

world.summary: The US has imposed new tariffs on over 80 countries, citing concerns over forced labor, a policy that has been met with criticism from trade partners and Democrats who argue it will harm Americans.

Four Palestinians and one Israeli settler were killed in a shooting in the northern West Bank, an incident that residents of a Palestinian village described as a settler attack involving the Israeli military.

Wildfires continue to spread across Spain and France, leading to the evacuation of tens of thousands, including the entire Cap Ferret peninsula in France, and prompting Spain to declare a national emergency.
